channel.title: Bayesian on TDJ28
channel.description: Recent content in Bayesian on TDJ28

item.title: Bayesian look at rapid tests
item.description: A look at how Bayesian statistics can help us understand ways to make decisions (in the context of COVID-19 rapid test accuracy). This post will introduce concepts related to Bayesian statistics, but may still be interesting to individuals already familiar with the topic.
